canonical_core.requested_outcome: Advance #892 by moving generic planning dict JSON output emission into generated-local planning_runtime, falling back to planning source runtime only for text/custom formatting.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not change text output. Do not claim #892 completion. Regenerate generated outputs from command_package_ir changes.

canonical_core.next_action: Configure planning emit_planning_operation_output for generated dict JSON output with source fallback, regenerate, and prove the generated branch exists.
completion_criteria: Generated planning_runtime.emit_planning_operation_output emits dict JSON locally when format=json.
Generated planning_runtime.emit_planning_operation_output falls back to repo_planning_bootstrap.runtime_projection for non-dict JSON and text/custom formatting.
Static proof guards the generated dict JSON branch.
The slice is archived as bounded generic-output extraction with #892 still open.
